name: Nebula Gyroid
description: Ethereal, flowing organic form created with raymarched gyroid SDFs. Features iridescent lighting, multiple blended gyroid layers, and mouse-reactive domain warping for a fluid geometry effect.
author: minimax.ai

params.name: Color Speed
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Iridescence
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Fog Density
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Specular Power
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
